flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Connecticut State Community College fell 34% between 2006 and 2009 (10.2% → 6.8%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Connecticut State Community College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.6k → $5.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Connecticut State Community College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($13.5k → $15.6k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Connecticut State Community College rose 1430% between 2021 and 2024 (2.2k → 33.6k).
